welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 120,000 Wyndham Rewards points; verify exact tiering, annual fee, and whether this maps to Earner Premier or Earner Business before applying.
notes: Review text named Wyndham Earner Premier 120k with $395 AF, but local data has Earner Business and Earner Plus, not a dedicated Premier data card.
Keep blocked/manual until issuer mapping is resolved.
source_conflicts: Card naming/path may be Earner Business rather than Premier in Barclays/Wyndham ecosystem.

open_questions: Resolve exact Barclays/Wyndham product mapping: Earner Premier vs Earner Business.
Create/rename dedicated data card if this is a distinct consumer Premier card.
Confirm Wyndham 9/30/2026 award-chart devaluation impact before assigning estimated value.
Resolved: Wyndham/Barclays press release confirms distinct Wyndham Rewards Earner Premier Card with $395 annual fee and up to 120k offer; create dedicated data card before production apply.
Dedicated production data card created 2026-06-30; run validation before applying further automated updates.

community.summary: Resolved: Wyndham Earner Premier is a distinct new premium card, not Earner Business/Plus. It needs a dedicated production card.

observations.excerpt: Issuer/Wyndham pages should determine whether the 120k offer belongs to Earner Premier or Earner Business and what annual fee applies.
